bird.name: Long-billed wren
bird.summary: The long-billed wren (Cantorchilus longirostris) is a species of bird in the family Troglodytidae. It is endemic to Brazil.

locations.name: 皮奧伊州
locations.summary: Piauí (, pyow-EE; pronounced [pi.aˈwi] or [pjaˈwi] ) is one of the states of Brazil, located in the country's Northeast…

locations.name: 巴伊亞州
locations.summary: 巴伊亚（葡萄牙語：Bahia）是巴西的26个州之一，地处东北部。面积565,733平方千米，首府是萨尔瓦多。巴伊亚北部是阿拉戈斯州、塞尔希培州、伯南布哥州和皮奥伊州，东部是大西洋，西部有戈亚斯州和托坎廷斯州，南部有米纳斯吉拉斯州和聖埃斯皮…

locations.name: 圣卡塔琳娜州
locations.summary: 圣卡塔琳娜州（葡萄牙語：Santa Catarina）是巴西南部的一个州，首府弗洛里亞諾波利斯，面积95,346.181平方公里，人口5,958,266人。 参见 胡利亚纳共和国

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

locations.name: 原始森林
locations.summary: 原始森林又稱原生林，是指一个森林已经达到非常非常长久的年龄而没有遭到显著的干扰，成功表现出独特的生态特征，并可能被归类为顶极群落。原生特性包括多样化的树有关的结构，提供多样化的野生动物栖息地，增加了森林生态系统的生物多样性。多样化的树结构…

locations.name: Caatinga
locations.summary: Caatinga (; [kaaˈt͡ʃĩɡɐ]) is a type of semi-arid tropical vegetation, and an ecoregion characterized by this vegetation…

relations.subject: Long-billed wren
relations.evidence: bahiae is the more northerly subspecies of long-billed wren; it is found in the "bulge" of eastern Brazil from Piauí south to Minas Gerais and east to the Atlantic coast

relations.subject: Long-billed wren
relations.evidence: longirostris is found in a narrower coastal band from Bahia south to eastern Santa Catarina

relations.subject: Long-billed wren
relations.evidence: The species inhabits secondary forest, the edges and shrubby clearings of primary forest, mangroves, caatinga, and restinga
